programs.title: The American Revolution
programs.desc: British General Cornwallis struggles to pacify the southern states; supported by the French, a victory at Yorktown secures independence for the Americans.

programs.title: Amanpour and Company
programs.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programs.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe: Michelangelo to Monet
programs.desc: Celebrating Europe's art and creative geniuses, from Leonardo Da Vinci to Vincent van Gogh; Florence's bold "rebirth" after Europe's medieval struggles; impressionist works of the late 1800s.

programs.title: Memory Makeover With Daniel Amen, MD
programs.desc: Dr. Daniel Amen explains the causes of memory loss, the seven foods and supplements that may enhance memory and how to supercharge memory with 11 simple daily practices.

programs.title: America Made With Love
programs.desc: Artisans including a cowboy, bootmaker and jewelry artist inspired by Indigenous ancestry embody the essence of American ingenuity.

programs.title: Arthur
programs.sub_title: Arthur Plays the Blues; Buster's Sweet Success
programs.desc: Arthur gets a new piano teacher; Buster volunteers to sell candy for the band.
